opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I felt completely washed out today, dizzy when walking to the kitchen, and my chest feels heavy.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Two episodes today of feeling like he might pass out while walking, plus chest heaviness, prompted him and his spouse to seek urgent advice.

symptom_narrative.onset: generalised tiredness over the past month, with two episodes today of near-fainting/dizziness on mild exertion
symptom_narrative.duration: background fatigue for about a month; today's dizzy episodes came on with walking and eased with rest
symptom_narrative.character: feeling 'washed out' and generally fatigued, with dizziness/lightheadedness on standing or walking, and a heavy, non-radiating feeling in the chest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: significant enough that he felt he might pass out and had to stop walking
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: dizziness with walking; chest heaviness in the middle of the chest, not spreading anywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: background fatigue has been present for about a month; today there were two separate dizzy spells with exertion, each easing with rest, but recurring again on standing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting or resting seems to help the dizziness settle
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking, standing up, and mild exertion
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild chest heaviness and feeling short of breath along with the dizzy spells; denies actually passing out, denies feeling his heart racing or fluttering
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: hasn't had anything like this before — the tiredness has crept up over the last month but today is the first time he's felt like he might faint
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally gets around independently but is now avoiding walking around the house because of the dizziness

past_medical_history.how_managed: takes a tablet for it every day

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried about falling and losing independence; spouse is anxious and pushing for prompt assessment

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes symptoms in straightforward terms, spouse may add extra detail or concern
